changes: Guardian: Recast time increased from 24 to 30 seconds.
Holy Sheltron: Sword Oath damage bonus increased from 10% to 15%; Shield Oath damage reduction reduced from 20% to 15%.
Wind's Reply: Movement speed duration increased from 3 to 4 seconds; Pressure Point potency increased from 8,000 to 10,000.
Earth's Reply: Potency increased from 2,000 + 25% damage to 3,000 + 25% damage; Cure potency increased from 4,000 + 50% damage to 6,000 + 50% damage.
High Jump: Potency increased from 4,000 to 6,000.
Starcross: Potency increased from 10,000 to 12,000.
Hissatsu: Chiten: Counter attack potency reduced from 6,000 to 4,000.
Hissatsu: Soten: Potency reduced from 4,000 to 3,000.
Zanshin: Potency reduced from 6,000 to 5,000.
Rattling Coil: Recast time reduced from 60 to 45 seconds; Recast reduction on kill/assist increased from 10 to 15 seconds.
Uncoiled Twinfang: Recast time reduced from 1 to 0.7 seconds.
Uncoiled Twinblood: Recast time reduced from 1 to 0.7 seconds.
World-swallower: Noxious Gnash damage bonus increased from 20% to 25%.
Repelling Shot: Potency increased from 4,000 to 4,500.
Pitch Perfect: First enemy potency increased from 8,000 to 9,000; subsequent enemies increased from 4,000 to 4,500.
Drill: Potency increased from 8,000 to 9,000.
Paradox: Potency increased from 6,000 to 9,000.
Xenoglossy: Added effect: Absorbs 50% of damage dealt as HP.
Radiant Aegis: Damage reduction increased from 20% to 25%.
Tempera Coat: Recast time reduced from 24 to 20 seconds; Recast reduction on barrier break reduced from 8s to 5s.
Tempera Grassa: Recast reduction on barrier break reduced from 8s to 5s.
Star Prism: Effect duration increased from 10 to 15 seconds.
Biolysis: DoT potency increased from 2,000 to 3,000; Recitation bonus reduced from 100% (doubled) to 50%.
Chain Stratagem: Duration increased from 6 to 10 seconds.
Seraphic Halo: Potency increased from 8,000 to 9,000.
Aspected Benefic: Diurnal Benefic HoT potency reduced from 4,000 to 3,000.
Gravity II: Potency reduced from 8,000 to 7,500; Heavy duration increased from 2 to 3 seconds; now only applies to first target.
Gravity II (After Double Cast): Potency reduced from 8,000 to 7,500; effect changed from Heavy to Bind; now only applies to first target.
Minor Arcana: Duration reduced from 20 to 10 seconds.
Epicycle: Barrier duration reduced from 10 to 5 seconds.
Pneuma: Barrier strength increased from 3,000 to 4,000 heal potency.
Haimatinon: Expiration heal increased from 3,000 per stack to 4,000 per stack.
Eukrasia: Recast reduced from 16 to 12 seconds.
Psyche: Potency increased from 10,000 to 12,000.
Toxikon II: Subsequent target potency increased from 2,000 to 4,000.

new_content.description: New class quests for Disciples of the Hand or Land.

new_content.name: The Case of the Displaced Inspector

housing.name: Furnishing Design Contest items
housing.description: New furnishings from the FFXIV Furnishing Design Contest.

glamour.name: Hairstyle
glamour.description: New hairstyle inspired by the FFXIV Hairstyle Design Contest entry.
